metadata.title: iMissive | Enterprise SMS, OTP & WhatsApp Business API
metadata.description: iMissive provides enterprise messaging infrastructure including SMS, OTP, WhatsApp Business API, SMPP, sender ID governance, delivery reporting, and compliance-focused communication solutions for high-volume organizations.

hero.subtitle: iMissive enables enterprises to manage SMS, OTP, WhatsApp Business, and API-based communications through scalable infrastructure, sender governance, real-time delivery visibility, and compliance-focused controls.

problem.title: Messaging failures are not marketing issues.
problem.subtitle: Every delayed OTP, failed notification, unmanaged sender ID, or missing delivery report can affect customer trust, operational continuity, and business performance.
problem.otp: OTP delays affect access and transactions
problem.otpDesc: When authentication messages are delayed, customers cannot log in, complete payments, or verify sensitive actions on time.
problem.routingDesc: Unoptimized routes can reduce delivery quality, increase latency, and create inconsistent communication performance.
problem.visibility: Limited visibility creates operational blind spots
problem.visibilityDesc: Without real-time delivery reporting, teams cannot identify failures, troubleshoot issues, or measure communication performance accurately.
problem.senderIdDesc: Uncontrolled sender IDs and weak approval workflows can increase regulatory, reputational, and operational risk.

channels.title: Enterprise Communication Channels
channels.subtitle: Purpose-built messaging solutions for critical business communications
channels.smsDesc: High-throughput SMS delivery with intelligent routing, sender ID support, and comprehensive delivery tracking for transactional and promotional messages.
channels.smsBenefits: Direct carrier connections | Arabic & English support | Delivery receipts
channels.otpDesc: Secure one-time password delivery optimized for speed and reliability. Protect logins, verify transactions, and authenticate users with confidence.
channels.otpBenefits: Sub-second delivery | High deliverability | Fraud prevention
channels.whatsappDesc: WhatsApp Business API for rich, interactive customer engagement. Send notifications, support tickets, and promotional content at scale.
channels.whatsappBenefits: Rich media support | Template messages | Two-way conversations
channels.chatbotDesc: Intelligent conversational AI that handles customer inquiries around the clock. Reduce repetitive support workload while improving response times and customer satisfaction.
channels.apiDesc: Developer-friendly REST APIs and enterprise SMPP connectivity for seamless integration with your existing systems and workflows.
channels.analyticsDesc: Real-time visibility into message delivery with detailed analytics, custom reports, and actionable insights for optimization.
channels.analyticsBenefits: Real-time tracking | Custom dashboards | Export capabilities

caseStudy.title: Enterprise Messaging in Action
caseStudy.subtitle: Example scenario showing how enterprise messaging operations can be improved
caseStudy.challengeText: A major financial institution needed to reduce OTP delivery times and improve authentication success rates while maintaining strict compliance with regulatory requirements.
caseStudy.solutionText: iMissive implemented dedicated routing with priority queuing, real-time delivery monitoring, and compliance-ready sender ID governance.
caseStudy.impactText: The institution achieved faster authentication flows, higher customer satisfaction, and complete visibility into their messaging infrastructure.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Common questions about enterprise messaging with iMissive
faq.a1: Enterprise SMS refers to high-volume, business-critical text messaging infrastructure designed for organizations. Unlike consumer SMS, enterprise SMS provides dedicated routing, delivery guarantees, sender ID management, API integration, and compliance features required by regulated industries.
faq.a2: Yes, iMissive specializes in OTP (One-Time Password) delivery with optimized routing for authentication use cases. Our OTP infrastructure prioritizes speed and deliverability, with average delivery times under 5 seconds and dedicated queuing for time-sensitive authentication messages.
faq.q3: Does iMissive support WhatsApp Business API?
faq.a3: Yes, iMissive is an official WhatsApp Business API partner. We provide full access to WhatsApp Business features including template messages, rich media, interactive buttons, and two-way conversations for customer support and notifications.
faq.q4: Can iMissive integrate with existing systems?
faq.a4: Absolutely. iMissive offers RESTful APIs, SMPP connectivity, webhooks, and SDKs for popular programming languages. Our platform integrates with CRM systems, ERP software, marketing automation tools, and custom applications.
faq.a5: Yes, iMissive fully supports Arabic messaging with proper Unicode encoding. Our platform handles Arabic text, mixed Arabic-English content, and right-to-left formatting to ensure messages display correctly on recipient devices.
faq.a6: Yes, iMissive provides comprehensive delivery reporting including real-time delivery receipts, detailed analytics dashboards, custom report generation, and API endpoints for programmatic access to delivery data.
faq.q7: Does iMissive support sender ID management?
faq.a7: Yes, sender ID governance is a core feature. iMissive provides sender ID registration workflows, approval tracking, compliance monitoring, and management tools to ensure your organization maintains proper sender identification.
faq.a8: Contact our sales team through the Request a Demo button or visit our contact page. Enterprise pricing is customized based on volume, channels, features, and support requirements. We offer flexible pricing models for different business needs.
